description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:git image with a docker:dind service and overlay2 driver. Define three stages: build-and-deploy, git-push-to-mirror, and update-docker-hub-readme, and set variables DOCKERHUB_REGISTRY, DOCKER_REGISTRY_DOCKERHUB_REPO, TMPTAG, DOCKERHUB_REPO_PREFIX, and DOCKERHUB_REPO_NAME. In the build-and-deploy stage add a "Docker build" job that runs only on the master branch, executes a before_script of `docker info` and logs in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_BUILD_TOKEN, then runs `docker build --pull -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$TMPTAG -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest -t $DOCKER_REGISTRY_DOCKERHUB_REPO:$TMPTAG -t $DOCKER_REGISTRY_DOCKERHUB_REPO:latest .`, `docker images`, `docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$TMPTAG`, `docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest`, logs in to Docker Hub via `echo "$DOCKERHUB_PASSWORD" | docker login -u "$DOCKERHUB_USERNAME" --password-stdin "$DOCKERHUB_REGISTRY"`, pushes the same tags to Docker Hub with `docker push $DOCKER_REGISTRY_DOCKERHUB_REPO:$TMPTAG` and `docker push $DOCKER_REGISTRY_DOCKERHUB_REPO:latest`, and finally logs out from both registries. In the update-docker-hub-readme stage add a "docker-hub:update-readme" job that also runs only on master, uses the docker:latest image with docker:dind service, and runs `docker run --rm -v $(pwd)/README.md:/data/README.md -e DOCKERHUB_USERNAME="$DOCKERHUB_USERNAME" -e DOCKERHUB_PASSWORD="$DOCKERHUB_PASSWORD" -e DOCKERHUB_REPO_PREFIX="$DOCKERHUB_REPO_PREFIX" -e DOCKERHUB_REPO_NAME="$DOCKERHUB_REPO_NAME" sheogorath/readme-to-dockerhub` to update the Docker Hub repository README. No caches or artifacts are defined.
